description: MCP server for Loomio (loomio.com and self-hosted instances). 9 tools across discussions, polls, comments, and group memberships via Loomio's b2 public API (auth: ?api_key=). Plus 2 opt-in instance-admin tools (deactivate / reactivate user) on the b3 namespace, gated by LOOMIO_B3_API_KEY. Read-only mode supported via LOOMIO_MCP_READONLY=1 — Cloud Run deployments default to this; local stdio enables writes by default. Read tools are annotated with readOnlyHint and destructive writes (manage_memberships with remove_absent, deactivate_user) carry destructiveHint so MCP clients can prompt before invocation.
